park_name: BIG4 Mornington Peninsula Holiday Park - Frankston

reviews.review_text: The Bog 4 is a delightful friendly caravan park. The staff are wonderful and extremely kind and helpful. The bathrooms are beautifully cleaned every day. There is a lovely pool. Tennis court. Sclkate ramp for children. Swings. Just a lovely family friendly park. Lovely trees. The roads are good and safe for the kids. I couldn't be more complementary. The few permanent people are delightful too. 5 out of 5, 10 out of 10! Thankyou so much.
Nice family place for holiday stays
It was such a pleasure staying here at Big 4 very clean and welcoming. I appreciate the cleanliness . Staff friendly and helpful. I’d love to come stay again .

I stayed in a one bedroom cabin.
Everything you needed was provided.
The cabins and grounds are well maintained.  Location is only a few mins away from shops...
Fantastic for you kids ,very clean park great people,
Great
Very kid friendly
I brought my camper along which was a great place to stay. I booked im for the australia Weekend for 3 nights in a cabin. Can't wait
Great place for familied

Great caravan park for the family, it's our second time here and the kids love it.

The cabins were clean and well maintained with all the basics to make it a home away from home.

We love this place because of its proximity to a big range of places to see or things to do. There are so many kid friendly activities within a 20 min drive it's awesome.

Staff have always been friendly and accommodating. We look forward to coming back again in the future!
Very well kept family site with great amenities for kids. Good central location for exploring Mornington Peninsula and SE suberbs.
We had a ensuite site for our van. The grounds are very well maintained and the service was excellent. Will come again.
Great access to Mornington & City
Second time staying there. Love the park. Amenities sparkling. Will be back again.

This holiday park is quite well maintained. Probably has the cleanest facilities of any holiday/caravan park ive been to. Staff were friendly and quite reasonable. Has a few things to keep kids and also adults entertained, including tennis court, jumping pillow, playground, swimming pool, pedal carts and a course for bikes/scooters to ride on. Caravan sites are quite generous. I would definitely recommend this if you are wanting to spend some time on the morningtom peninsula
Love the tall ceilings, not claustrophobic. Good size kitchen, lounge room and bathroom. Comfy beds.
Friendly helpful service. Amenities are immaculate.
Caravan site with ensuite great for a family with a van without all the bells and whistles

We recently stayed at the BIG4 Mornington Peninsula Holiday Park in Frankston and absolutely loved it! The park was clean, well maintained, and had a really welcoming feel from the moment we arrived. Our cabin was spotless, comfortable, and well equipped — everything worked perfectly and it was clear the place is looked after with care. The grounds were tidy, the facilities were great, and the staff were friendly and helpful throughout our stay.

The only downside was that we accidentally left behind two unopened bottles of wine and some sealed snacks in our cabin after checking out. We still had friends staying another night, so they went to ask about them just a couple of hours later, but were told the cleaning staff had already taken them. It was a bit disappointing, as the items were clearly unopened and could’ve easily been returned.

Aside from that hiccup, we really enjoyed our stay and would absolutely return — BIG4 parks continue to set the standard for cleanliness, comfort, and service, but this is the only reason I didn’t give it a 5-star.

The location was great for us to visit family both on the Mornington Peninsula and Frankston area. The staff were beyond amazing! So generous- it really made the difference for my kids and visiting family. The pedal carts/bikes were so much fun for all (adults and kids). The jumping pillow, flying fox, tennis and basketball were all so great to have right there on-site. The kids were so happy with scooters and helmets to suit both my 3 & 6 yr old. The little cabin had everything we needed. Again, I cannot talk highly enough of the kindness & generosity of the staff. A truly great place to stay. We will be back when visiting family again. The pool will add to the fun in summer months. Far too cold in June so it was covered up. Thank you to the staff!

My sister recently visited from interstate and stayed here. We visited most days and we were blown away.
The amenities were amazing. So much for the kids to do but also the adults. Staff were lovely. Place was well kept and all around fabulous. Highly recommend here if you’re looking for somewhere to stay for yourself or family!

I wish I'd have got some photos while it was still light.

Such a great place.
There is sound from the highway adjacent, but it quickly fades out and becomes second nature.

I came here on mother's day weekend 2025.
Mum and partner were in Melbourne, travelling through with the caravan. So I thought I'd take the spot next to them for 2 nights.

GREAT facilities. The toilets and showers are clean, accessible, and not over flowing with water on the ground. Very tidy. And serviced daily.

Lots of bird life!
The lots are plenty big enough for all kinds of caravans.
Very nice staff.

There's even a really cool bike track for the young ones

Very happy with my 2 nights.

Thankyou for making our stay enjoyable 😊

We stayed in a deluxe cabin and it was just great!  Spacious and restful outlook.  Very comfortable bed.  Actually slept 9+ hours the first night - I usually struggle to get 7 hours straight.  We were given a whole litre of milk for our stay of three nights, and discovered a packet of Tim Tams in the fridge. :) The friends we were visiting were in Baxter Village which was right next door, so it was heaps convenient.
Lovely park great hearing kid's playing and having a great time

It's always a terrific place to stay. The cabin was quiet and in a great location,  near the edge of the park. We had a visit from a pair of tawny frogmouths, which was so lovely to see. The cabin was the usual well-fitted out kitchen, and we cooked every day. The park has all the amenities you would expect and is very safe and quiet.
Sites too close to each other. Great camp kitchen. Clean amenities.
Spent 4 days here relaxing. Nice pool. Nice amenities. Laundry. Felt safe with boomgates at the entrance.
Friendly owners, clean cabin . nice warm shower short drive to shops and places of interest.5 minutes to motorway if you want to see the city of Melbourne better still explore the peninsula.
Very tight hard to reverse into sight don't recommend it
Staff were so friendly and I asked for a quiet spot for the baby.. and that’s exactly what they did! I am so grateful. Thank you for having us.

Staying here with my family for a couple days and I can say it's a small but lovely spot. The only issue that I have is that the pool is supposed to be open at 9am but every time we go in the morning they're closed for cleaning. I get that they need to clean the pool but of they state it opens at 9am, then it should open at that time so they should clean it earlier.
A great caravan park for us to stay 2 days in our caravan close to our family in Frankston. A very pleasant atmosphere surprised me  just how nice it was.
What a hidden gem this park is. Very quiet amenities spotless, close to everything on the peninsula. Definitely will return.
Stayed in a lovely, clean and comfortable cabin while down for my daughters wedding. Great park with great amenities. Perfect spot to relax after a busy few days.
Nice park, good facilities for the kids but not actually on the Mornington Peninsula - about a 20 min drive to Mornington from the park itself - the park is in Frankston which isn't very picturesque!

This park is fabulous we arrived in the dark & the lights were turned on & the heater was also on so the cabin was nice and warm. The cabin was absolutely spotlessly clean, electric blankets on all beds (bonus) fresh milk in the fridge, everything u need was there ,great facilities awesome staff. Well done to the manager & staff. 😊😊😊

We loved our mini getaway. We had a complementary pack of chocolates on arrival. Check in was easy with late checkin option. Staff super friendly and all the amenities were fantastic. Easy central location. Our children where happy and we were placed right next to jumping pillow. Our family will be back.

We loved our stay at the Big4 Mornington Peninsula and we are looking forward to go there again. Staff were friendly and accommodating and the place is very chid-friendly. Our kids were very busy as there was heaps to do. We took out caravan and hired one of the en-suite sites. The en-suite was very clean and even had a hand towel, a bath mat and some little toiletries as well. We are definitely coming back 😊

Our stay at Big 4 Mornington Holiday Park was fantastic. The service was amazing, with friendly staff and excellent management. The park facilities were top-notch, offering great value for money. Both kids and adults enjoyed the pedal karts, and the property was clean and well-maintained. The location was also convenient. Highly recommended!

Extremely happy with our nights stay, staff went above and beyond to accommodate our needs. We had a large boat in tow and the manager assisted with placing us in a cabin with a large secure parking area in front. Thankyou will definitely stay again 👌
Stayed for 3 Days. Family friendly atmosphere. Great clean facilities. Lisa and the staff are very helpful. We really enjoyed our stay. Thank you.
Some utensils items were missing in the unit. But was ok

I had to cancel my booking due to illness. When I rang the park I was told a full refund would be given & was. Such a lovely attitude, when these days, a park will always justify why a fee has to be taken from the deposit for a cancellation. Thank you Lisa (?) & hopefully we'll be back soon to visit family.
Took our caravan easy site to park in staff helpful. Recommended
Nice park. Nice staff.
This was a grate place for my 2 sons and mum and me

We had a wonderful weekend, we stayed in a cabin which was very clean and had everthing we needed. We took our grandaughter away for the weekend, the playground facilities were amazing, she had the best time. Highly recommend, great location 5 minute drive to the beach.
Staff were very friendly and helpful. Will definitely be back.

Hubby, 2 kids and I took the caravan for the long weekend. Obviously the park is not located in Mornington but in Frankston. The location worked well for us though, very close to a fantastic Ritchie's, 10 minute drive to the beach and main street of Frankston.
Clean facilities, good sized van spots, very friendly management and love the pedal karts for the kids. The park is on the smaller side and has alot of long term residents but being smaller it feels a bit more comfortable letting the kids ride around.
When we were there we had an ice cream truck on 2 separate nights and movies on 3 nights in a row through a projector.
No onsite shop/store but it's not really necessary.
Jumping pillow, pump track,  flying fox, climbing frame, pool (also a little on the small side), pedal karts, laundry facilities, clean toilet and shower facilities, onsite BBQ and undercover eating area with access to multiple fridges, a TV and kitchen sink

Excellent location, clean modern facilities great grass area for caravans and camping. Perfect activities and entertainment for kids of all ages, basketball/ tennis courts, bike tracks, jumping pillow and pool. Excellent location for the peninsula close to town and beaches.
Highly recommend and will definitely be back.
Fantastic  opportunity to  live and great  mature staff as well great clean  cabins as well very nice Frankston city centre various things to consider
Quiet clean good location

We are currently still holidaying in the park here for 7 nights, and have to say the parks staff have been amazing. The park itself has quiet to do, all 3 of my children have been loving it. The cabins are perfect can't complain ( love the fridge/freezer best one we have have had in all the big 4s we have been too.. Will deff come back again and rebook if we want to holiday in mornington.

Oh just the internet towers need to be completed asap. However was nice with no signal for a little bit.  More bonding with the family I guess.

Thank you so much to the amazing staff.. I only caught one of the names.. Kyle... gotta love ya  xx CBN 124

Friendly staff. Milk and Tim Tams came with room as well as coffee making facilities. Happy with room as it was compact, clean and linen/towels provided. Small kitchen with everything needed for self-catering. Holiday park had a small pool, a rec room, tennis court and spots for caravans-powered/unpowered. 10-minute drive to the mall
Stayed in our caravan. Staff were so helpful

Great place, gardens have improved, kids liked free carts/buggies, movie room was great for the family, good facilities, even when booked out, there is plenty of space, previous years you could not move when booked out! Highly recommend
We stayed during winter so the park was extremely quiet. A little out of the way for us but Park was clean and staff helpful.

Fantastic place to stay. Great team in reception. Super friendly. The 3 bedroom cabin was great and the beds were so comfortable.  The playground was amazing and kept our child entertained all day. We woukd definitely recommend staying here.
Very noisy,  shoting foul mouth people to close to main road

An absolutely beautiful caravan Park very clean with lovely amenities all caravan sites are large with beautiful big trees for shade. There cabins are clean and modern with verandas so you can sit outside.
Excellent facilities, clean well maintained. Lovely caravan park.
Highly recommend 👌 Couldn't ask for a better fathers day getaway
In the website they said they have Camping Sites with a picture of two tents in the ground, but then when you try to book it says "We don't accept tents".
Stayed here in a couples cabin the staff fantastic service the cabin neat and clean the park it self very clean with everything you need for your stay highly recommend this place
